description: A feature spec template for adding or changing authentication or authorization behavior: credential and session flow, authorization boundaries, wrong-credential and lockout behavior, expiry, revocation, replay protection, rate limiting, audit events, and security tests.

variables.name: actor
variables.description: Primary actor who authenticates (a user role or client system).

variables.name: sessionKind
variables.description: Kind of credential artifact issued after successful authentication.

examples: specbridge template apply authentication --name login-session-refresh --var actor=user --var sessionKind=token
